attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the menu item, changes the looks of it and prevents it from emitting the click event

attributes.name: show-children
attributes.description: Controls if nested items should be shown.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Set an href, this will turns the label into a anchor tag.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Set an anchor tag target, only used when using href.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description: Set the rel attribute for an anchor tag, only used when using href.

attributes.name: caret-label
attributes.description: Sets the aria-label for the caret button.

attributes.name: select-only
attributes.description: Enforce selection interaction and prevent all other interactions, set this when the UI is turned into Selection-Mode.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Enable the ability to select this element.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Attribute applied when the element is selected.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Set this boolean to true for then the related composition is sorted.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disables the menu item, changes the looks of it and prevents it from emitting the click event

properties.name: showChildren
properties.description: Controls if nested items should be shown.

properties.name: href
properties.description: Set an href, this will turns the label into a anchor tag.

properties.name: target
properties.description: Set an anchor tag target, only used when using href.

properties.name: rel
properties.description: Set the rel attribute for an anchor tag, only used when using href.

properties.name: caretLabel
properties.description: Sets the aria-label for the caret button.

properties.name: renderExpandSymbol
properties.description: Overwrite the expand symbol rendering, this replaces the Expand Symbol from UI Library.

properties.name: selectOnly
properties.description: Enforce selection interaction and prevent all other interactions, set this when the UI is turned into Selection-Mode.

properties.name: selectable
properties.description: Enable the ability to select this element.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: Attribute applied when the element is selected.

properties.name: active
properties.description: Set this boolean to true for then the related composition is sorted.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

events.name: show-children
events.description: fires when the expand icon is clicked to show nested menu items

events.name: hide-children
events.description: fires when the expend icon is clicked to hide nested menu items

events.name: click-label
events.description: fires when the label is clicked

events.name: selected
events.description: fires when the media card is selected

events.name: deselected
events.description: fires when the media card is deselected

cssProperties.name: --uui-menu-item-indent
cssProperties.description: set indentation of the menu items

cssProperties.name: --uui-menu-item-flat-structure
cssProperties.description: set to 1 to remove the indentation of the chevron. Use this when you have a flat menu structure
